subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, which have been sent down in truth from the realm of transcendent might, that thou mayest render thanks unto God, thy Lord, and detach thyself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت بالحق من جبروت عز علیا لتشکر الله ربک و تنقطع عن
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
